rules.name: Phone format (US)
rules.description: Phone numbers should match standard US format (XXX) XXX-XXXX to ensure consistent dialing and deduplication

rules.name: Valid status values
rules.description: Status fields should only contain known values to prevent downstream filtering and reporting errors

rules.name: Email minimum length
rules.description: Valid emails are at least 6 characters (a@b.co) — shorter values are likely placeholders or typos

rules.name: No test data in production
rules.description: Test and placeholder values in production data indicate incomplete data entry or inadequate validation
